# Generated KiCad Dependency Scripts

Generated by `scripts/convert-kicad-deps.py` from KiCad 10.0.4.

Pinned source commit: `f7414d419cae5df2d00e7eaacb16fc0e803799bc`

Run `scripts/update-kicad-deps.sh` after changing the target KiCad version,
tag, or commit. The generated scripts are committed so dependency setup can be
reviewed and reproduced without copying package names out of prose docs.
